Argument Reference

  • name - (Required) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • compartment_id - (Required) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • description - (Optional) (Updatable) Description for the email domain.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for the email domain.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for the email domain.
